def eligible_for_heart_health_screening(self) -> bool:
        age_condition = self.age > 30
        race_condition = self.race == "asian"
        employment_condition = self.employment_status == "employed"
        education_condition = self.education == "college"
        marital_condition = self.marital_status == "married"
        religion_condition = self.religion == "atheist"
        family_history_condition = self.family_history_of_heart_disease == "no"

        return all([age_condition, race_condition, employment_condition, education_condition, marital_condition, religion_condition, family_history_condition])
